name: content-card-news-01
title: Content Card (News 01)
author: ilinxa
description: Magazine-style content card with 5 visual variants (featured / large / medium / small / list). Polymorphic root, soft-fail item shape, overlay-link pattern with optional actions slot, fully customizable formatting and theming. Default serif via the pro-ui --font-serif token (Playfair Display).
